tonePresets.label: Formal
tonePresets.description: Professional, respectful, business or academic language. Best for teachers, managers, and official communication.

tonePresets.label: Friendly
tonePresets.description: Warm, approachable, and positive while staying professional.

tonePresets.label: Casual
tonePresets.description: Relaxed and natural everyday language. Best for friends and informal communication.

lengths.label: Short
lengths.description: 1 short paragraph or 2–3 sentences. Core message only — never changes tone or vocabulary.

lengths.label: Medium
lengths.description: 2–3 paragraphs (greeting, body, closing for email). Structure only — never changes tone or vocabulary.

lengths.label: Long
lengths.description: 4+ paragraphs with full detail. Structure only — never changes tone or vocabulary.

complexityLevels.label: Simple
complexityLevels.description: Everyday words only — vocabulary choice, not length or tone.

complexityLevels.label: Standard
complexityLevels.description: Normal professional vocabulary — word choice only.

complexityLevels.label: Advanced
complexityLevels.description: Sophisticated words and varied sentences — vocabulary only.
